description: User enters their phone number into the input field.
frame_description: The user types digits into the phone number field; an error message about the number format is visible until the full number is entered.

description: The 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button becomes active and the validation error message disappears after a valid phone number is entered.
User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the button and a loading spinner briefly appears inside it.

description: The numeric keyboard is dismissed from the screen.
A red error box with the message 'Something Went Wrong' appears above the button.
User pauses for several seconds after the 'Something Went Wrong' error message appears, likely reading the message.
The page transitions to a loading screen with the message 'Loading.... You're moving along nicely.'
A loading animation featuring a house icon is displayed while the user waits.
